findings.description: RST cross-reference syntax (:ref:`...`) was not converted to plain text. The raw markup (e.g., `:ref:`画面初期表示(初期表示に必要な情報をデータベースから取得し、画面を表示する) <basic>`) remains in the knowledge file content, which is not clean markdown for AI consumption. The process names are still readable inside the markup, but the RST syntax is noise.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST :ref: directives for internal links. Knowledge file should render the label text only (e.g., '画面初期表示(初期表示に必要な情報をデータベースから取得し、画面を表示する)') without the surrounding :ref:`...` wrapper.

findings.description: The hint '入力画面と確認画面の共通化' is missing from s2. This is one of the four processing patterns listed for ユーザ情報登録機能 in the feature table and is a key searchable concept.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: 'ユーザ情報登録機能' includes ':ref:`入力画面と確認画面の共通化 <sharingInputAndConfirmationJsp>`' as one of the four described processing patterns.
